title: Track day weapon
review_text: This is my track day shoe. Pebax foam is bouncy and responsive. Feels fast without being a full race flat. Sits perfectly between my daily trainer and race shoe.

title: Heel rubbed at first
review_text: Narrow heel cup caused a blister on my first run. Used heel-lock lacing and it was fine after that. By run 3 it broke in completely. Great shoe for speed work.
